# Acme Marketing - Digital Marketing & Indoor Billboard Advertising

> Digital marketing agency specializing in indoor billboard advertising and full-service marketing for Colorado businesses.

## About Us

Acme Marketing is a full-service digital marketing agency based in Denver, Colorado. We help local businesses grow through indoor billboard advertising and full-service digital marketing.

## Services

### Indoor Billboard Advertising
- Screen Advertising: Hyper-local digital screens in high-traffic venues — [/indoor-billboards/screen-advertising](https://progressive-section-template.vercel.app/indoor-billboards/screen-advertising)
- Venue Network Locations: See where ads appear — [/indoor-billboards/locations](https://progressive-section-template.vercel.app/indoor-billboards/locations)
- Become a Venue Partner: Host a billboard in your business — [/indoor-billboards/become-a-venue-partner](https://progressive-section-template.vercel.app/indoor-billboards/become-a-venue-partner)

### Foundational Marketing Services
- Website Design & Development: SEO-friendly, mobile-ready sites — [/solutions/foundational/website-design](https://progressive-section-template.vercel.app/solutions/foundational/website-design)
- Google Business Profile Management: Local search optimization — [/solutions/foundational/google-business-profile](https://progressive-section-template.vercel.app/solutions/foundational/google-business-profile)
- Social Media Management: Strategic content and engagement — [/solutions/foundational/social-media-management](https://progressive-section-template.vercel.app/solutions/foundational/social-media-management)
- Design Services: Professional graphic design — [/solutions/foundational/design-services](https://progressive-section-template.vercel.app/solutions/foundational/design-services)

### Lead Generation Services
- Pay-Per-Click Advertising: Google Ads that drive conversions — [/solutions/lead-gen/pay-per-click](https://progressive-section-template.vercel.app/solutions/lead-gen/pay-per-click)
- Social Media Advertising: Targeted ads on Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn — [/solutions/lead-gen/social-media-advertising](https://progressive-section-template.vercel.app/solutions/lead-gen/social-media-advertising)

### Branding & Awareness Services
- Connected TV & OTT Ads: Non-skippable streaming TV ads — [/solutions/branding-awareness/connected-tv](https://progressive-section-template.vercel.app/solutions/branding-awareness/connected-tv)
- Display Advertising & Geofencing: Location-targeted digital ads — [/solutions/branding-awareness/display-geofencing](https://progressive-section-template.vercel.app/solutions/branding-awareness/display-geofencing)
- Streaming Audio Ads: Podcast and music streaming advertising — [/solutions/branding-awareness/streaming-audio](https://progressive-section-template.vercel.app/solutions/branding-awareness/streaming-audio)
